content: Execute mandatory testing gate - run all tests, oracle harness, linting
Conduct honest assessment of progress toward surpassing R
Mandatory code audit using zen mcp tools
Plan next sprint priorities based on assessment
CRITICAL: Complete design matrix construction in dmatrix crate
HIGH: Create comprehensive R performance benchmark suite
HIGH: Fix interaction term parsing to match R semantics (a*b = a+b+a:b)
MEDIUM: Replace custom statistical functions with statrs crate
